headline: PAYCOM SOFTWARE INC (NYSE:PAYC): A Decent Value Stock with Strong Profitability and Low Valuation
summary: Paycom Software (PAYC) fits a Decent Value screen, combining a low P/E ratio of 14.49 with exceptional profitability and no debt, offering a margin of safety for patient value investors.
